x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist Virtual Agent integration enables AI-powered intent matching and generative response capabilities within VA conversations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist VA plugin (sn_nowassist_va) via sys_plugins_list.do. Configure Now Assist integration in VA Admin Console. Now Assist enhances VA with generative AI and improved intent matching.
